text.en: Pix2Pix showed that many image translation tasks could share one conditional GAN framework when paired input-output examples were available. It made edges-to-photos, maps-to-aerial images, and labels-to-scenes feel like variations of the same learning problem.
text.zh: Pix2Pix 表明，只要有配对的输入输出样本，许多图像转换任务都可以共享一个条件 GAN 框架。它让边缘到照片、地图到航拍图、标签到场景看起来像同一类学习问题的不同变体。

text.en: Image-to-image translation with conditional adversarial networks
text.zh: 使用条件对抗网络进行图像到图像转换
